title: Advanced vanilla (AV)
description: A vanilla feel of Minecraft with more to create, explore, and build
body:
## # Advanced vanilla
**I made this modpack with the intent of making vanilla Minecraft more entertaining by adding more foods, crops, furniture, and cabinets to make your storage rooms look a little better, There are also 4 new bosses added to the game, rarely found in the end, the nether, caves, and in cold biomes. This modpack also makes exploring your vanilla-like world more fun with the Dungeons and Taverns mod. But don't you worry if you can't remember all the new crafting recipes because there's a mod for that. The roughly enough items mod will appear on the side of your crafting menu, which will tell you how to craft the item that you need.**
